{{Quote|Failure's become a common thread in your life, hasn't it?|Thorne Kraym|<ref name="Empire 32">[[Empire 32|''Empire'' 32]]</ref>}}
'''Nolan Gillmunn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the leader of the [[Jabiimi]] resistance during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and son of famed [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] leader [[Orliss Gillmunn]].

==Biography==
===Clone Wars===
One of the [[Jabiimi Loyalists]], Nolan Gillmunn fought alongside his [[Parent/Legends|father]] [[Orliss Gillmunn]] against the [[Jabiimi Nationalists]] led by the [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Alto Stratus]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Empire 29" /> After the Nationalists, who allied with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], gained the upper hand, the Jabiimi Loyalists gathered on the [[Monsoon Mesa]], where they were to be evacuated by Galactic Republic transport ships. However, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], who was leading the evacuation efforts on Jabiim, ordered that only his own clone troopers be rescued for tactical military reasons as well as lack of space. Thus, Anakin abandoned the planet, leaving the Jabiimi Loyalists to their fate.<ref name="Republic 58">[[Republic 58|''Republic'' 58]]</ref> Nolan and other Loyalists witnessed the Republic's betrayal,<ref name="Empire 30">[[Empire 30|''Empire'' 30]]</ref> while Olriss swore their eternal vengeance.<ref name="Republic 58" />

But instead of surrendering to the Nationalists and the Confederacy, the Loyalists continued to fight.<ref name="Empire 32" /> In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref><ref name="Heroes on Both Sides">{{TCW|Heroes on Both Sides}}</ref> Orliss and Nolan planned an [[Battle of Hyber Canyon|attack]] on the droid command center in [[Hyber Canyon]]. Although Nolan recognized that this was an act of desperation due to their outnumbered numbers, he stood by his father.<ref name="Empire 32" /> During the [[massacre at High Rock Canyon]], Nolan witnessed his father being stabbed to death with a blade by the Jabiimi Nationalist [[Thorne Kraym]]. However, Nolan himself survived.<ref name="Empire 33">[[Empire 33|''Empire'' 33]]</ref>

===Galactic Civil War===
[[File:Nolan.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Nolan during the meeting with [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].]]
Around [[0 ABY/Legends|seven months ABY]], Gillmunn invited a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] diplomatic team led by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to meet with the resistance. When the Empire became aware of the Rebels' presence, they attacked in an attempt to capture Skywalker. Gillmunn took a team and left to help Skywalker escape, but eventually they were ambushed and captured by Imperials. Just as the Imperial captain gave the word for the Jabiimi squad's execution, they were interrupted by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] orbital bombardment. Soon after, [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] arrived in his [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] to finish off the remains of the Imperials. Skywalker left with the Rebels, but Gillmunn and his team stayed.
